x-component.description: Remove targets in all or a given set of text units. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

tusForTargetRemoval.title: Comma-delimited list of ids of the text units where targets are to be removed (empty - remove all targets)

targetLocalesToKeep.title: Comma-delimited list of locales of the text units of targets that should be kept (empty - keep all targets)

filterBasedOnIds.title: If true filter on ID's, if false filter on locales (you cannot filter on both)

removeTUIfNoTarget.title: If true remove the Text Unit if it has no remaining targets, if false do nothing
